sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n2497" key="ai(mulo/frwn" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">αἱμῠλόφρων</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, gen. <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ονος</itype>, (<etym lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="etym">φρήν</etym>) <sense id="n2497.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">wily-minded</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0434.tlg001:379b" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Cratin.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">379b</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
